title: stelis calantha
intro: Stelis calantha, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis calantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
